metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students develop competency in automotive systems, maintenance procedures, and diagnostic techniques. This course explores engine systems, vehicle maintenance, troubleshooting methods, and safety practices relevant to automotive technology.
metadata.general_description: An applied course in automotive systems, maintenance, diagnostics, and professional safety practices.

big_ideas.statement: Vehicle systems are interconnected and interdependent, requiring systematic understanding of how components function and interact.
big_ideas.elaboration: Knowledge of mechanical, electrical, and fluid systems enables technicians to diagnose and resolve complex vehicle problems.

big_ideas.statement: Preventive maintenance and regular servicing extend vehicle life, improve safety, and reduce long-term operating costs.
big_ideas.elaboration: Understanding maintenance schedules and procedures helps vehicle owners and technicians maintain vehicle reliability and safety.

big_ideas.statement: Diagnostic procedures and troubleshooting methods enable technicians to identify problems systematically and efficiently.
big_ideas.elaboration: Methodical diagnostic approaches, tool proficiency, and technical knowledge support accurate problem identification and repair.

big_ideas.statement: Safety in automotive work requires adherence to procedures, proper equipment use, and awareness of hazards and risks.
big_ideas.elaboration: Workplace safety practices protect technicians and ensure quality repairs that maintain vehicle safety.

competencies.raw: Design maintenance and service plans for vehicles
i_can_statements: I can develop preventive maintenance schedules
I can design service procedures for different vehicle types
I can plan maintenance sequences and timelines
I can create maintenance documentation and records

competencies.raw: Plan diagnostic procedures for vehicle problems
i_can_statements: I can develop systematic diagnostic approaches
I can design troubleshooting sequences
I can plan diagnostic testing procedures
I can design repair and restoration plans

competencies.raw: Design modifications and improvements to vehicle systems
i_can_statements: I can plan system upgrades and improvements
I can design performance modifications safely
I can plan modification sequences
I can evaluate modification impacts on vehicle performance

competencies.raw: Evaluate vehicle systems and recommend repairs
i_can_statements: I can assess vehicle condition and performance
I can identify needed repairs and maintenance
I can prioritize repairs based on safety and importance
I can estimate repair scope and recommendations
I can perform oil and fluid changes
I can maintain filters and consumables
I can perform basic inspection and adjustment
I can service brakes, suspension, and steering systems
I can perform systematic vehicle inspections
I can use diagnostic equipment and tools
I can interpret diagnostic results
I can identify problem sources and causes
I can remove and install automotive components
I can perform engine and transmission work
I can repair electrical and electronic systems
I can perform welding and fabrication repairs

competencies.raw: Maintain workplace safety and proper procedures
i_can_statements: I can follow safety procedures in automotive work
I can properly lift and support vehicles
I can handle hazardous materials safely
I can maintain clean and organized work areas

competencies.raw: Use automotive diagnostic equipment and tools
i_can_statements: I can use diagnostic scanners and code readers
I can use multimeters and electrical testing equipment
I can use specialized automotive tools
I can maintain and calibrate diagnostic equipment

competencies.raw: Apply technology to engine and fuel system diagnosis
i_can_statements: I can diagnose engine management systems
I can test fuel system components
I can perform compression and performance testing
I can interpret engine sensor data

competencies.raw: Understand vehicle electrical and electronic systems
i_can_statements: I can diagnose electrical system problems
I can test batteries, alternators, and starters
I can understand vehicle computer systems
I can diagnose modern electronic control systems
I can understand hybrid and electric vehicle systems
I can assess autonomous vehicle technologies
I can evaluate new diagnostic technologies
I can stay current with automotive industry changes

areas.name: Diagnosis and Troubleshooting
topics: Problem identification and root cause analysis
